pages.text: Early game is vanilla plus structures. Loot gives Ancient Component Shards and route hints, not full automation.
Pick one core path freely. The first two steps of each path stay internal. Around stage 3 you need a Cross-Discipline Adapter, which can be made through several different pairs.
Midgame combines two paths regularly. Late game asks for several paths. Endgame combines all path capstones into the Universal Recipe Matrix.
